active_checklist: Watch the six StatiBaker/Kanboard managers and promote only after tests and docs gates close.

child_heartbeat.current_step: all six manager lanes closed; promotion gated with focused tests and recorded residuals

lane_claim: Supermanager monitor for StatiBaker local runsheet plus Kanboard projection roadmap; no direct file ownership beyond orchestration state.
notes: FORMAL MODEL: O/R/C/S/L/P/G/F. O: user owns workflow; this runner is the supermanager state surface. R: coordinate managers for StatiBaker local runsheet JSON, Kanboard projection, and SensibLaw task extraction without making external UI canonical. C: StatiBaker/docs/kanboard_runsheet_roadmap.md, StatiBaker docs/TODO/CHANGELOG, SensibLaw/src/statibaker_kanban.py, local Kanboard installation, orchestrator status/runsheet JSON. S: broad cross-project integration with existing dirty worktree; do not revert user changes. L/P: prefer gpt-5.1-codex-mini for narrow workers and gpt-5.1-codex-max for coupled implementation. G: local JSON remains canonical; Kanboard is one-way projection until conflict policy exists. F: local Kanboard credentials/API details and exact bridge schema gaps must be discovered by managers.

items.title: Frame StatiBaker/Kanboard roadmap into lane topology
Monitor manager heartbeats, logs, and runsheets in tmux
Promote only after verification/governance lane closes residual gaps
